title.en: Smart task time is running low

titleFormatted.en: [[device]] smart task has [[hours]] hours or fewer remaining

hint.en: Fires once when the hours remaining until the smart task's Ready by drops to the chosen value or fewer. Re-arms when the Ready by is rescheduled. Use it to act a fixed lead-time before a deadline (e.g. 2 hours or fewer). The [[hours_remaining]] tag carries the whole hours remaining at the crossing.
